intro: Nedabiah (meaning moved by the LORD; the LORD is willing) was a son of Jeconiah (Jehoiachin), the captive king of Judah who was carried to Babylon (1 Chr. 3:18). He thus belonged to the Davidic royal line during its exile but is otherwise unattested. His name appears only in the genealogical list of the royal family's continuation in captivity.
hitchcock_meaning: prince or vow of the Lord
